phases.name: Critical Bugs & Data Integrity
phases.goal: Fix runtime bugs and data integrity issues

tasks.description: Fix storage property access bug in sitemap_service.py (self.storage vs self._storage)
steps: Verify self._storage is the initialized attribute (line 255)
Change self.storage to self._storage at lines 675 and 699
Run pytest tests/unit/services -k sitemap --tb=short to verify

tasks.description: Add missing symbol count validation for comma-separated inputs in market.py
steps: Add MAX_SYMBOLS_PER_REQUEST = 50 constant at module level
After symbol_list creation, add: if len(symbol_list) > MAX_SYMBOLS_PER_REQUEST: raise HTTPException(400, f'Maximum {MAX_SYMBOLS_PER_REQUEST} symbols allowed')
Filter empty strings: symbol_list = [s for s in symbol_list if s]
Run pytest tests/unit/api -k market --tb=short to verify

phases.name: Layer Boundary Violations
phases.goal: Move raw SQL from API/tasks to storage/repository layer

tasks.description: Move raw SQL query in strategies.py to StrategyStorage.get_performance_history()
steps: Read strategies.py lines 297-306 (raw SQL for strategy_performance)
Add get_performance_history(strategy_id, limit) method to StrategyStorage
Return list of dicts with date, trades_30d, win_rate_30d, etc.
Update get_strategy endpoint to call storage method

tasks.description: Use existing get_strategy_signals() for single signal retrieval in strategies.py
steps: Read strategies.py lines 599-608 (raw SQL for strategy_signals)
Replace raw SQL with storage.get_strategy_signals(strategy_id, limit=1)
Handle empty result case for HTTPException(404)

tasks.description: Replace raw SQL in strategy_monitoring_tasks with storage.get_strategy_trades()
steps: Import get_strategy_storage and call storage.get_strategy_trades(strategy_id, cutoff_date)
Transform result to match existing usage pattern

tasks.description: Unify strategy monitoring performance constants with StrategyStorage

Refactor rotate_logs_task to use _build_cleanup_result with would_action_list
